title: Growing Up Biden
author: Valerie Biden Owens
subline: A memoir by Valerie Biden Owens.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A family tree: 4 children at the bottom, branching up to 2 parents. The middle child (Joe) is RED, the others ash. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1180)" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1.5">
    <!-- Two parents at top -->
    <g transform="translate(0 0)">
      <circle cx="-200" cy="0" r="40"/>
      <line x1="-200" y1="40" x2="-200" y2="200"/>
      <text x="-200" y="240" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">MOTHER</text>
    </g>
    <g transform="translate(0 0)">
      <circle cx="200" cy="0" r="40"/>
      <line x1="200" y1="40" x2="200" y2="200"/>
      <text x="200" y="240" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">FATHER</text>
    </g>
    <!-- 4 children at bottom -->
    <g>
      <g transform="translate(-450 600)">
        <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="36"/>
        <line x1="0" y1="36" x2="0" y2="120"/>
        <text x="0" y="160" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">JIMMY</text>
      </g>
      <!-- JOE: RED -->
      <g transform="translate(-150 600)" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="2.5">
        <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="42"/>
        <line x1="0" y1="42" x2="0" y2="120"/>
        <text x="0" y="160" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="0.18em">JOE</text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(150 600)" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1.5">
        <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="36"/>
        <line x1="0" y1="36" x2="0" y2="120"/>
        <text x="0" y="160" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">VALERIE</text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(450 600)" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1.5">
        <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="36"/>
        <line x1="0" y1="36" x2="0" y2="120"/>
        <text x="0" y="160" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">FRANKIE</text>
      </g>
    </g>
    <!-- Connecting lines: parents → 4 children -->
    <g stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.7">
      <path d="M -200 200 Q -325 350 -450 600"/>
      <path d="M -200 200 Q -175 350 -150 600"/>
      <path d="M 200 200 Q 175 350 150 600"/>
      <path d="M 200 200 Q 325 350 450 600"/>
    </g>
    <path d="M -100 250 Q -125 400 -150 600" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  </g>
  <text x="800" y="2200" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.4em">ONE SISTER'S STORY OF A BROTHER</text>
</svg>
rationale: A family tree: two parents at the top connected by hairline curves to four children at the bottom (Jimmy, Joe, Valerie, Frankie). The middle child — Joe Biden — is the only one rendered in red 2.5px stroke + red label. The rest are graphite 1.5px. The connecting parent-to-Joe line is also red 1.5px. Title 320px mixed case, two lines, weight 300. The composition is a sibling portrait.
